hardware/altium-workflow.title: Altium Export Workflow
hardware/altium-workflow.description: When publishing a project page, I export schematics and PCB layouts from Altium Designer as high-resolution PNG images. This page documents the exact steps and settings I use.

projects/sht31-sensor-board/hardware.title: Hardware
projects/sht31-sensor-board/hardware.description: PCB designed in Altium Designer. 4-layer stackup, ENIG finish, 50 mm × 35 mm.

projects/sht31-sensor-board/index.title: SHT31 Sensor Board
projects/sht31-sensor-board/index.description: A compact, battery-friendly temperature and humidity sensor node built around the ESP32 SoC, running Zephyr RTOS. The board connects to a Sensirion SHT31 sensor over I2C, logs readings locally, and exposes a BLE GATT service for remote readout.

projects/sht31-sensor-board/results.title: Results
projects/sht31-sensor-board/results.description: Honest account of what happened, in order. No cleanup.
